text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for me to experience the number
one view!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer! There's no time to waste! Let's
ride the roller coaster!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, me neither. I can't believe this theme park
has such an exciting ride.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was skeptical when you said that you wanted to
give me a reward for all my hard work...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't say no to getting a taste of being in
the highest spot in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now let's get up... there...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's with this huge line?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A long line snakes all the way to the roller
coaster's entrance. The ride schedule says the
wait time will be...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: T-two hundred minutes?! That can't be right!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And we have to stand the whole time? I came
here to take a break, not to get even more tired!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
B-but we came all this way... Grrr! What should we
do?
choice_data_list: Are you... giving up on the number one view?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Everyone's lined up for this, so I bet
the other rides are empty.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right! In times like this, you just take another
path to number one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet and I try out a lot of other rides.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... So dizzy... You spun that tea cup way too
fast!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Th-though we were definitely number one... at
spinning our cup... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You should have seen your face... Trying so hard!
Hehe—ohhh, laughing makes me feel even
dizzier...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But with this, we're now number one at almost all
of the rides!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We were number one at the shooting gallery, and
we set a new record on the go-karts! Let's see,
what else...
choice_data_list:
I think we're number one at enjoying the park
today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...That sounds ridiculous. But, come to think of
it...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I really did have a lot of fun today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway! It's getting late! We've still got a lot to
do tomorrow, so let's head back!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've got my sights set on being number one in the
next race, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being "number one" with Daiwa Scarlet today has
been a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Me... give up?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Never!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! These legs have carried me to the
number one spot time and time again! This is
nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet and I decide to wait in line.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Miler... So I need to say a word starting with an r...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Gah, again with the r! How many times are you gonna give me r?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I'm tired of this game. We've been standing
here forever...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And we still have a ways to go. But I'm not about
to give up now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The most important moment of a race is the
halfway point, you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to inch our way up the twisting line
until, at long last...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yes! Fiiinally! We're here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: We're up next. You ready, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Exactly! That's why we're here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Get ready! I'll show you who's worthy of standing
in the number one spot, on top of all of Japa—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Aaaaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Scarlet and I experience the highest
viewpoint Japan has to offer—its number one
spot.
